name: Devesto (Die of Death)
description:

<- 0:16 ─〇───── 2:33 ->

◃◃ ⅠⅠ ▹▹

"Whenever I have a date with you,"
"I'm always so VERY high!"

I am so happy someone actually knew where the voicelines came from (for Devesto) because I literally was a postal glazer in 2021-2023 (I wish I was kidding). And when brain damage came out I was an even BIG glazer.

Now for the more important stuff (instead of me being a stupid fangirl). I am so FUCKING sorry that I have been lowkey not posting. I have been wanting my bots to go back to the high quality they used to have, so I'm really making sure to take my time whenever I want to make one (YES, when I WANT to make one).

In short... longer time equals better quality bots (also I'm testing my bots, not this one though, I fucking hate Devesto).


Also Devesto acts like postal dude (insufferable asshole) so be careful he will LITERALLY not hesitate to kill you on the spot.

Idiotic tags: Postal 2, Postal 1, Postal, Devesto, Dod, Die of Death, Artful.
